UserAccount.title: UserAccount
UserAccount.description: Information about a registered student and their learning progress

id.description: Unique user identifier from Firebase Authentication

status.description: Admin approval status of the student account

progress.description: Learning progress container for courses, lessons, quizzes, recipes, and badges

CourseReview.title: CourseReview
CourseReview.description: Feedback and rating submitted by an enrolled student for a course instructor

courseId.description: The ID of the course being reviewed

studentId.description: The user ID of the student who wrote the review

studentName.description: The name of the student who wrote the review

studentEmail.description: The email of the student who wrote the review

feedback.description: Detailed text feedback for the course instructor

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp of when the review was created

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of all user accounts and their associated training progress data

/reviews/{reviewId}.description: Collection of all student reviews for course instructors
